module_field_value_label: In module "{module_title}", order items by "{selector_field_label}" from {rank_order_phrase}. What value is shown under "{answer_field_label}" for the {rank_ordinal} item?
Find module "{module_title}". Rank its items by "{selector_field_label}" from {rank_order_phrase}; read "{answer_field_label}" for the {rank_ordinal} item.
Within "{module_title}", use "{selector_field_label}" to identify the {rank_ordinal} item in {rank_order_phrase} order. What is its "{answer_field_label}" value?
Using "{selector_field_label}" in module "{module_title}", find the {rank_ordinal} item when ordered {rank_order_phrase}. What value appears in "{answer_field_label}"?
Read the "{answer_field_label}" value for the item ranked {rank_ordinal} by "{selector_field_label}" from {rank_order_phrase} in module "{module_title}".
module_field_ranked_item_label: In module "{module_title}", order field "{field_label}" from {rank_order_phrase}. Which item is {rank_ordinal}?
Find module "{module_title}". For field "{field_label}", what item label is {rank_ordinal} when ordered {rank_order_phrase}?
Within "{module_title}", rank the visible "{field_label}" values from {rank_order_phrase}. What item label is {rank_ordinal}?
Using the "{field_label}" field in module "{module_title}", which item ranks {rank_ordinal} in {rank_order_phrase} order?
What item label in module "{module_title}" is {rank_ordinal} in {rank_order_phrase} order for "{field_label}"?
page_field_extremum_module_label: Across the page, which module has the {rank_direction} visible value for field "{field_label}"?
Scan all modules that show field "{field_label}". What module title contains the {rank_direction} value?
For the shared field "{field_label}", which module has the {rank_direction} value across the page?
Using all visible modules with field "{field_label}", which module title has the {rank_direction} value?
When the "{field_label}" values are ordered {rank_order_phrase} across modules, which module title is first?
module_two_field_condition_item_label: In module "{module_title}", which item has "{numeric_field_label}" {condition_phrase} {threshold_value} and "{category_field_label}" equal to "{category_value}"?
Find module "{module_title}". What item label matches both "{numeric_field_label}" {condition_phrase} {threshold_value} and "{category_field_label}" = "{category_value}"?
Within "{module_title}", read the item whose "{numeric_field_label}" is {condition_phrase} {threshold_value} and whose "{category_field_label}" is "{category_value}".
Using module "{module_title}", which item satisfies "{numeric_field_label}" {condition_phrase} {threshold_value} with "{category_field_label}" "{category_value}"?
What item label in module "{module_title}" matches the two conditions: "{numeric_field_label}" {condition_phrase} {threshold_value} and "{category_field_label}" = "{category_value}"?
module_condition_item_count: In module "{module_title}", how many items have "{field_label}" {condition_phrase} {threshold_value}?
Find module "{module_title}". Count the items whose "{field_label}" value is {condition_phrase} {threshold_value}.
Within "{module_title}", what is the number of items with "{field_label}" {condition_phrase} {threshold_value}?
Using field "{field_label}" in module "{module_title}", count the items {condition_phrase} {threshold_value}.
How many item values in module "{module_title}" are {condition_phrase} {threshold_value} for "{field_label}"?
module_field_total_value: In module "{module_title}", what is the total of all visible "{field_label}" values?
Find module "{module_title}". Add every item value under field "{field_label}".
Within "{module_title}", what sum do you get from the "{field_label}" values?
Using the "{field_label}" field in module "{module_title}", compute the total across all items.
What is the combined value for field "{field_label}" in module "{module_title}"?
two_module_field_total_comparison_module: Compare modules "{module_a_title}" and "{module_b_title}". Which module has the larger total for field "{field_label}"?
For field "{field_label}", add the visible values in "{module_a_title}" and in "{module_b_title}". Which module title has the larger total?
Between "{module_a_title}" and "{module_b_title}", which module has the greater sum of "{field_label}" values?
Using the "{field_label}" field, total the listed values in modules "{module_a_title}" and "{module_b_title}". Which module is larger?
Which of "{module_a_title}" or "{module_b_title}" has the higher total when all visible "{field_label}" values are summed?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.
global.object_description: a dense mixed infographic page with titled modules, item labels, field labels, printed values, and native context text

query:module_field_value_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible value string
query:module_field_value_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box around the answer value cell

query:module_field_ranked_item_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible item label at the requested rank
query:module_field_ranked_item_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box around the visible item row, card, or container holding the answer item label

query:page_field_extremum_module_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible module title
query:page_field_extremum_module_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box around the winning module panel

query:module_two_field_condition_item_la.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible item label satisfying both conditions
query:module_two_field_condition_item_la.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box around the visible item row, card, or container holding the answer item label

query:module_condition_item_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of matching items
query:module_condition_item_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes around every matching value cell

query:module_field_total_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer total
query:module_field_total_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes around every value cell included in the sum

query:two_module_field_total_comparison_.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible module title with the larger total
query:two_module_field_total_comparison_.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box around the winning module panel
